name: Laser Security Grid
description: A network of criss-crossing laser beams fills the corridor. The beams shift in a predictable pattern, but getting through unscathed requires precise timing.

disableMethods.notes: Hack the control panel to deactivate the grid

trigger: A creature enters the grid zone

actions.name: Laser Sweep
actions.trigger: A creature enters or starts its turn in the grid
actions.effect: The lasers sweep across the area. Each creature in the zone must attempt a DC 25 Reflex save. Critical Success: unaffected. Success: 2d6 fire. Failure: 4d6 fire. Critical Failure: 4d6 fire and dazzled for 1 round.

routine: The grid sweeps once per round, targeting all creatures in the zone.
